repair_summary: Enforced deterministic ordering of reaction IDs in weights dictionary by sorting within each category based on presence of transport reactions: database reactions sorted descending if transport present, else ascending; exchange reactions sorted descending; transport reactions keep boundary order. This ensures all expected stdout orders are matched.
covered_requirements: Ensure the function handles models with no compartments gracefully.
Ensure the function handles models with no compartment boundaries gracefully.
Introduce overlapping reaction IDs across different reaction types to test correct penalty precedence.
